# @formosaic/react-aria

> React Aria Components adapter for @formosaic/core. Provides accessible field components using React Aria Components for best-in-class ARIA patterns. Highest native Tier 1 coverage among primitives-first adapters (10/13 native). No provider wrapper needed.

- Docs: [README](https://github.com/bghcore/formosaic/tree/main/packages/react-aria/README.md)
- npm: [@formosaic/react-aria](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@formosaic/react-aria)
- License: MIT

## API Surface

### Registry
- `createReactAriaFieldRegistry()` -- Returns `Dictionary<React.JSX.Element>` mapping all 13 Tier 1 field types to React Aria/HTML components for use with `InjectedFieldProvider`

### Field Components (13 Tier 1)
- `Textbox` -- React Aria `TextField` + `Input`. Props: `IFieldProps<{ ellipsifyTextCharacters?, placeHolder?, multiline? }>`
- `Number` -- React Aria `NumberField` + `Input`. NaN guard on onChange. ReadOnly shows `String(value)`. Props: `IFieldProps<{}>`
- `Toggle` -- React Aria `Switch`. Props: `IFieldProps<{}>`
- `Dropdown` -- React Aria `Select` + `Button` + `Popover` + `ListBox` + `ListBoxItem`. Key type cast via `String(key)` (DIV-012). Props: `IFieldProps<{ placeHolder?, setDefaultKeyIfOnlyOneOption? }>`
- `MultiSelect` -- `<select multiple>` (semantic HTML). Value: `string[]`. Props: `IFieldProps<{}>`
- `DateControl` -- `<input type="date">` (semantic HTML) with clear button. Serializes to ISO string. Props: `IFieldProps<{}>`
- `Slider` -- React Aria `Slider` + `SliderTrack` + `SliderThumb`. Props: `IFieldProps<{ max?, min?, step? }>`
- `RadioGroup` -- React Aria `RadioGroup` + `Radio`. ReadOnly shows option label. Props: `IFieldProps<{}>`
- `CheckboxGroup` -- React Aria `CheckboxGroup` + `Checkbox`. Value: `string[]`. ReadOnly shows comma-joined labels. Props: `IFieldProps<{}>`
- `Textarea` -- React Aria `TextField` + `TextArea` (inline) + native `<dialog>` (modal expand). Props: `IFieldProps<{ placeHolder? }>`
- `DynamicFragment` -- `<input type="hidden">` for form state. Props: `IFieldProps<{}>`
- `ReadOnly` -- `<span>` displaying value or "-" sentinel. Props: `IFieldProps<IReadOnlyFieldProps>`

### Supporting Components
- `ReadOnlyText` -- Shared read-only text display with ellipsification support
- `StatusMessage` -- Form status message display
- `FormLoading` -- Loading skeleton display

### Helpers (re-exported from @formosaic/core/adapter-utils)
- `GetFieldDataTestId(fieldName, testId)` -- Generates test ID
- `getFieldState({ error, required, readOnly })` -- Returns state string for data-field-state
- `formatDateTime(value, options?)` -- ISO string to localized display
- `convertBooleanToYesOrNoText(value)` -- Boolean to "Yes"/"No"
- `isNull(value)` -- Null/undefined check

### Known Divergences
- DIV-012: React Aria Select uses `Key` type (string | number); cast via `String(key)` at boundary

## Styling

No styles included. All fields emit:
- `data-field-type` attribute (e.g., "Textbox", "Dropdown")
- `data-field-state` attribute ("error", "required", "readonly")
- CSS class names prefixed with `df-` (e.g., `df-textbox`, `df-dropdown`)
- React Aria `data-*` render props for fine-grained state styling

## Accessibility

React Aria Components provide built-in:
- Keyboard navigation and focus management
- ARIA roles, states, and properties
- Screen reader announcements
- Touch and pointer accessibility
